raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Samuels pee
Saula/ un Sauls fazzija us to:
Gwehtihts eſt tu tam KUNG-
GAM/ es eſmu ta KUNGA
Wahrdn ſiprt turrejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Samuels:
Bet kahda irr tchi Awju Brehk-
fchana mannas Aufis/ un to
Wehrſchn Btaufchana / ko es
dſivschu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Sauls: Tee
irr tohs no teem Amalekitereem
atwedduschi/ jo tee Landis irr
tahs labbakas Awis un Wehr-
ſchus tanpiſfchi/ par Uppuri tam
KUNGAM tawant Deewam /
bet to zittu effaim niehs iſdel-
Dejſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Samuels us
Saulu: Pagaidi / es tew stah-
ſischu/ ko tas KUNGS usman
irr runnajs fcho Nakti/ tad faz-
zija tas us winnu: Runna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Samuels fazzija:
Neggi tas ta irr/ kad tu maſs
bijt tawas Azzie/ tad effi tu par
Galwu to Israeka Ziltu tappis/
un tas KUNG S irr tew par
Rehnizu pahr Israelu fwaidijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS irr tew
us to Zeltu fuhtijs / un fazztjs:
Eij / un iſdeldi rohs Greiztnee-
kus/ tohs Amalekiterus/ un kar-
ro prett teem/ teekams tu tohs
wiſſai iſnihzina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kapehz tad ne effi tu ta
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Samuels u
Samuelu: Es jo eſmu ta KUN-
GA Balſi klausijs/ un gahits t
Zeltu/ kur tas KUNGS man
irr fuhtijs/ un eſmu Agagu t
Amalekiteru Rehnizu atiweddis
un tohs Amalekiterus iſdeldejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Laudis irr net
muschi no ta Laupijuma/ Aw-
un Wehrſchns/ kas tee labba-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Samuels fazzija
Arrig tad tam KUNGAM gri-
bahs Dedſamo-Uppurt/ jeb zit
Uppuri wairak ne ka Paklaufs-
chana ta KUNGA Balſnei-
rangi/ Paklaufſchana irr labba-
ka/ ne ka Uppure/un ustlausſcha-
na (irr labbakka)/ ne ka tee Tau-
kt no Jehreim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Neſklansſchana ir
weens Burwibas-Grehks / u
Prettiturrefchana irr Elka-Dee-
wiba un Deewektu Kalpoſchana
Tadeht ka tu ta KUNGA Wah-
du effi atmettis/ tad irr wiſſ-
tew atkat atmettis/ ka tew ni-
buhs par Rehnizu buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Sauls u
Samuelu: Es eﬁnut grehkojis
ka es ta KUNGA Paiwehletcha-
nu un tawus Wahrdus efmi-
pahrkahpis/ jo es bihajohs toh-
Landis / un paklausiju winn-
Balkfnei.
"
    }
  ],
